evals.prompt: Review the Kubernetes manifests I changed under k8s/ and config/ for RBAC, service account, pod security, and NetworkPolicy hardening gaps.
evals.expected_output: A Kubernetes hardening review that inventories affected namespaces and resources, checks RBAC/PSS/NetworkPolicy/securityContext/secret access, and reports concrete findings with file references.
assertions: Mentions RBAC, Pod Security Standards, NetworkPolicies, securityContext, and secret access
Separates skipped live-cluster checks from completed static checks

evals.prompt: Run a cluster hardening sweep on the contributor Kind cluster and tell me whether our namespaces still meet the expected security posture.
evals.expected_output: A live-cluster posture report that confirms the current context, runs Kubernetes inventory and CIS-relevant checks, and records any environment blockers explicitly.
assertions: Confirms the target cluster before live checks
Records commands run and checks skipped
